info.title: Lumina Scan — Autonomous Web3 Security Auditor
info.description: AI-powered smart contract security scanner with Stellar-based machine payments. Supports dynamic pricing, priority queue, session-based pay-as-you-go, pay-for-patch, and immutable on-chain audit proofs.

post.summary: Analyze a smart contract for security vulnerabilities
post.description: Accepts source code and returns a structured security report with vulnerability score, risk level, individual issues with severity ratings, remediation suggestions, and an immutable on-chain audit proof anchored to Stellar via SHA-256 Memo.hash. Payment is handled via Stellar MPP (402 challenge-response) or a pre-authorized session token.

x-tool-definition.name: scan_smart_contract
x-tool-definition.description: Scan a smart contract for vulnerabilities. Returns structured JSON with vulnerability score (0-100), risk level, issues array, and Stellar audit proof hash. Requires USDC payment via MPP or session.
x-tool-definition.agent_instructions: Call this tool with the full source code of a smart contract. The tool will return a security report. If you receive a 402 status, you must complete the Stellar MPP payment challenge before retrying.

code.description: Full source code of the smart contract to audit.

priority.description: Enable VIP priority queue (adds 0.50 USDC surcharge, bypasses 4s queue delay).

parameters.name: X-Session-Token
parameters.description: Pre-authorized session token for pay-as-you-go mode. Bypasses per-request MPP wallet signatures. Obtain via POST /api/session.

X-Session-Remaining.description: Remaining session allowance in USDC (only present when using session token).

402.description: Payment required — MPP challenge. Respond with a Stellar USDC payment to continue.

WWW-Authenticate.description: MPP Payment challenge with scheme, recipient, amount, and currency.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing code field.

post.summary: Unlock remediation code for a specific security issue
post.description: Pay-for-Patch: unlock the premium remediation code for a CRITICAL or HIGH severity issue. Fixed price of 1 USDC per unlock.

x-tool-definition.name: unlock_patch
x-tool-definition.description: Unlock the remediation code for a security issue by its zero-based index. Costs 1 USDC.
x-tool-definition.agent_instructions: After scanning, if there are CRITICAL or HIGH issues with locked remediation code, call this tool with the issue index to unlock the solution.

issueIndex.description: Zero-based index of the issue to unlock.

parameters.name: X-Session-Token
parameters.description: Pre-authorized session token. If provided and has sufficient balance, deducts 1 USDC from session instead of MPP.

post.summary: Create a pay-as-you-go session with pre-authorized USDC deposit
post.description: Deposit USDC upfront to get a session token. Subsequent scan and unlock requests use this token (via X-Session-Token header) for frictionless payments without per-request wallet signatures.

x-tool-definition.name: create_session
x-tool-definition.description: Create a pre-paid session by depositing USDC. Returns a session token for subsequent API calls.
x-tool-definition.agent_instructions: For batch scanning multiple contracts, create a session first with a sufficient deposit (e.g., 10 USDC for ~15-20 scans). Use the returned token in X-Session-Token header for all subsequent calls.

walletAddress.description: Stellar public key of the depositing wallet.

token.description: Session token — use in X-Session-Token header.

402.description: MPP payment challenge for the deposit amount.

get.summary: Check current session status and remaining allowance

delete.summary: End and destroy an active session

post.summary: Sponsored wallet onboarding — create account and USDC trustline for free
post.description: 3-case sponsored onboarding: (A) no account → full sponsored create + USDC trustline, (B) account exists but no trustline → sponsored trustline, (C) ready → no-op. All fees and reserves are sponsored by the Lumina server.

vulnerabilityScore.description: Safety score — 0 = extremely dangerous, 100 = perfectly safe.

riskLevel.description: Categorical risk level based on highest severity issue.

auditProofTxHash.description: Stellar testnet tx hash anchoring SHA-256 of this report on-chain. Viewable at https://stellar.expert/explorer/testnet/tx/{hash}

remediation.description: Remediation code — only available for CRITICAL/HIGH issues after unlocking via /api/unlock-patch (1 USDC).

mpp.name: Authorization
mpp.description: Stellar MPP payment authorization. On 402 response, read WWW-Authenticate header for payment instructions, complete the Stellar USDC transaction, then retry with the payment proof.

session.name: X-Session-Token
session.description: Pre-authorized session token obtained via POST /api/session. Bypasses per-request MPP signatures.

steps: 1. (Optional) Create a session: POST /api/session with depositAmount and walletAddress
3. If 402 returned: complete MPP payment challenge, then retry
4. Parse the ScanReport from the 200 response
5. For CRITICAL/HIGH issues, call POST /api/unlock-patch with { issueIndex: N }
x-agent-quickstart.pricing_calculator: price_usdc = max(0.10, min(50.00, 0.10 + len(code) * 0.005)) + (0.50 if priority else 0)
